heading: Penalties
label: 47531 Penalties
text: A person violating section 47528, 47529, 47530, or 47534 of this title or a regulation prescribed under any of those sections is subject to the same civil penalties and procedures under chapter 463 of this title as a person violating section 44701(a) or (b) or any of sections 44702–44716 of this title.
notes: Historical and Revision Notes. 103–272Pub. LRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4753149 App.:2157(e)., , .Nov. 5, 1990Pub. L. 101–508, § 9308(e)104 Stat. 1388–383
Pub. L. 103–429This amends 49:47531 to correct a grammatical error and erroneous cross-references.

Amendments2012— struck out “for violating sections 47528–47530” after “Penalties” in section catchline and substituted “47529, 47530, or 47534” for “47529, or 47530” in text.Pub. L. 112–951994— substituted “section 47528” for “sections 47528” and inserted “any of” before “those” and “any of sections” before “44702–44716”.Pub. L. 103–429
